raw_input:
[5.0/5] I love this for long, frizz free hair. I really like this! I have long hair myself, and 4 daughters with long hair, I just use a couple pumps right on the brush and it makes hair so smooth and shiny. Adding this to the brush instead of my hands makes it so much easier and less mess on my hands.
this also has such a pleasant smell. [5.0/5] Highly Recommend!! I received this product for free in exchange for an honest review. The next morning I washed my hair and followed directions. It felt so smooth and had a nice fragrance to it. I really used a small amount, about the size of a pea – if that. My hair felt amazingly smooth. I use a straightener but it seemed like this product helped that process.

That day it rained and I got stuck in it – bye straight hair! Later I went to fix the frizz and pick up my husband when all of a sudden Im standing there looking in the mirror. My hair was straight. It had picked up some volume from the humidity but it didn’t look bad at all! So now full of confidence I charged on to finish my day. My husband had made a few comments about my hands being soft. I didn’t think anything about that but they did feel softer. [1.0/5] More silicone than argan oil. Actual ingredients not clearly listed. I bought this because the seller listed the main ingredients as argan oil and resvesterol, when in fact the product is full of silicon and demethicone is listed before argan oil. I can see why there are rave reviews from other users. This will give your hair a great TEMPORARY shine and silky soft feel but will end up robbing it of shine shortly and prevent your hair from absorbing moisture. You are not coating your hair with Arian oil but a rubber derivative. So th cuticle lays down short term but never gets the moisture that is causing the damage and frizz to begin with. I think someone who has science in their name would know that. Long term demethicone use will cause more drying and damage and is not good for your hair.

I had actually wanted to use this product on my face, not hair because of the resvesterol. But it has an extremely strong scent of sandalwood that is overpowering and I would never be able to use it on my face.

The bottle arrived in a box but leaked all over. I would have returned anyway because of the demethicone and smell. I bought pure cold pressed argan oil to use instead. It smells naturally like poo as all of them do but the smell dissipates in a few minutes.

I do think the seller should make its ingredients clear to prospective buyers and not just list the deceptive "main ingredients" omitting the ingredients that are listed first when the package actually arrives and therefore are really the main ingredients. [4.0/5] Chic bottle, good product. I wanted to try this argon oil because it has both argon oil and resveratrol. When this product arrived, it was in a cardboard box. I was surprised that the bottle was tucked into a corner of the box, and there was a lot of empty space. I love the bottle in which this product arrived. It is very elegant and chic looking. I definitely will be saving this bottle when it is empty. My hair gets greasy quickly, so this product didn't work for me as a leave - in product. I use it for an occasional deep conditioner, however, and my hair feels amazing afterwards! I also use this product on my daughter's frizzy, curly hair. It makes her curls shiny and soft. I also like to use this product on my face now and then. The smell is very strong, but it smells good. [5.0/5] Anyway I love the way my face feels when I use Visible ... I have been useing this product for a couple weeks now, it really makes a difference!
I have only used it on my face so far! I am using up the argan oil I have for my hair
then I will try it on my hair! Anyway I love the way my face feels when I use
Visible Science! [5.0/5] The first product to ever make my hair feel silky. I recently did a blog post on this product because the company gave me a bottle free of charge to do a blog review and video review on. It is good for skin but I used this on my hair. I have kinky curly, afro textured hair and it can get dry if left untreated. I don't have trouble finding products that can moisturize my hair. I even make my own oil blends to help keep my hair moisturized. This oil gave my hair a nice sheen (my type of hair does not shine it is too textured for that) when used between washings. When I used on freshly washed hair before I set it and then styled it the next day, it made my hair feel soft and silky. I can honestly say this is the first product that ever made my hair feel silky. For that alone I give this 5-stars. I think I will straighten my hair sometime soon to see how it works when my hair straight. [3.0/5] Three Stars Oooohhmm!! [5.0/5] Love this product Love this product. It worked so well. I began seeing a difference in only 3 days which is amazing. I am always skeptical when trying new products like this but since I received it free I gave it a try and it really works. [5.0/5] this stuff is pretty good as you can use it on your skin ... I have been using this on my Goatee because of a dry patch of skin under the air. After using for 2 weeks the dry patch was gone! this stuff is pretty good as you can use it on your skin as well as on the hair! oh it is important to mention that it is filled with other ingredients which help the skin. [5.0/5] Surprisingly good product. I got this as a gift from a family member. As I was skeptical at first I didn't use it for a while. But, I had a day where my hair was really frizzy and dry and it was making me look and feel awful, so I gave this product a try. I was amazed at the results. My hair behaved instantly and I was able to style it and get it looking like I had it professionally styled. The bottle lasts a long time, so its also a pretty good value. [5.0/5] Five Stars Excellent price - Excellent product [5.0/5] I love this Argan Oil I love this Argan Oil!! It is rich in Vitamin E and omega 3 oils. And it is organic! My hair feels much healthier since I have been using this oil. It actually nourishes and repairs my color-treated hair. My split ends aren't as noticeable, and my frizzies are gone! Especially with winter being here, my ends aren't as dry as they usually are. A few drops goes a long way. And it doesn't leave your hair with an oily feel. Just gives you softer, shinier, healthier hair. I really love my soft curls! I received this product free for my review, but my opinions are my own. [5.0/5] Visible Results with More than one Use - Visible Science Organic Argan Oil [[ASIN:B00KQW9ZKI Anti Aging Hair Serum with Argan Oil by Visible Science -- Hair Moisturizer to Repair Damaged Hair with Resveratrol - Antioxidants - Astaxanthin -- Organic - Non-Greasy - Vanilla Scented (2oz)]]

I received my Visible Science Organic Argan Oil as a gift and loved the packaging not to it's completely organic and really delivers amazing results! We all know that their are many different Argan Oil's on the market but all are not created the same. I visited their website and was quickly impressed with the ingredients. I am pleased to see that every purchase supports the women who harvest their Organic Argan Oil. This is a definite plus and I will be purchasing more for myself and family. When I use it on my face it truly gives me a healthy glow and the results are amazing. More bang for your buck since it works on your hair, skin and nails not to mention it fades scars. I'm living proof that it fades scars and works within 3 weeks! My skin and hair looks awesome. I highly recommend purchasing one for you and more for holiday gifts. [5.0/5] Great stuff. I PURCHASED this due to reviews on the internet and it has not disappointed. It is amazing that you can put an "oil" on your hair and leave it in, but your hair isn't oily at all - it's sooo soft and silky. I also use it on my face, for about a month or 6 weeks now. My skin is just looking better and better. So I recommend this product. [2.0/5] Pure argan oil is better and lower cost This product is not effectively acting as an oil anymore! I have pure Argan oil and this one is totally different when applied. It disappears and contains a lot of silica based products. The scent is strong and heavy to smell it on the self as it doesn't fade at all and is always noticeable.

When I applied it on my hair and shampooed the next day the hair went dry and stuck to each other, losing its natural oils I'm used to.

I'm not sure if I will be able to continue using it. I'm going back to the Pure Argan oil. [3.0/5] Okay I was sent this product for free. I tried it and it was okay. I used it on my hair, as I have bleached hair and it can get very dry. Often times I like to use an oil to smooth fly aways as well, however this product was a little too oily for my hair. It weighed it down a little and made my hair a bit greasy. If your scalp doesn't get oily fast, then it may be a good alternative to the more expensive products out there that do the same thing. [5.0/5] I love this product I love this product. My hair was so dry prior to using it and now it is extremely shining and lustrous. The ends are so much more manageable and looks like I just had a fresh haircut and stepped out of a high end salon. I highly recommend this product I am older and my hair is thinning and I feel so much more confident after using it.

response:
Most reviewers love product. Hair get smooth, shiny, frizz gone. Work on face too - skin feel soft, look healthy. Some say fade scars. One use on dry skin patch under beard, patch gone in two weeks. Smell strong, most say good, some say too strong especially sandalwood. Few drops go long way, bottle last long time.

Bad reviews say product mostly silicone and dimethicone, not real argan oil. Ingredients list misleading. One say dimethicone bad long term, dry out hair, block moisture. Another say product make hair dry and sticky after washing. One say too oily, weigh hair down.

Most get product free for review. Results generally good short term. Skeptics become believers. Packaging nice, bottle elegant. Work on hair, skin, nails. Some say pure argan oil better and cheaper.
